notes: Phase 4 COMPLETE — all 8 subphases done. Phase 4.8 SLA monitoring: sla_monitor.py (500+ lines), SLATracker with SQLite, 6 metrics, auto-breach detection, SLAMiddleware, 4 dashboard endpoints, 73 tests. Phase 5 (Sudarshan Wasm Module) next.

history.summary: Phase 4.8 COMPLETE — ENTIRE PHASE 4 DONE. brahmanda/sla_monitor.py (500+ lines): SLAMetric dataclass (name/value/threshold/direction/status/unit/timestamp), SLABreach dataclass, SLATracker class with SQLite persistence (3 tables: sla_requests, sla_kills, sla_breaches), 6 SLA metrics (uptime>=99.9%, avg_response<500ms, kill_rate<5%, false_positive_rate<1%, MTTD<1000ms, api_availability>=99.9%), auto-breach recording on slow requests, date-range breach queries, singleton via get_sla_tracker/reset_sla_tracker. SLAMiddleware (BaseHTTPMiddleware) records all request durations+status codes. DiscusGuard: sla_tracker parameter, _record_sla_kill() called from _fire_on_kill() on all kill paths. dashboard/app.py: 4 new endpoints (GET /api/sla/status, GET /api/sla/metrics/{name}, GET /api/sla/breaches, GET /api/sla/stats). brahmanda/__init__.py: exports all SLA types. 73 new tests all passing. 0 regressions. Backward compatible: SLA completely optional, no impact if module missing.

Phase 4.4 COMPLETE. webhooks.py (340 lines): WebhookManager with SQLite persistence, HMAC-SHA256 signature verification, fire-and-forget async POST with 3-attempt exponential backoff retry, 7 event types (RULE_VIOLATION, DRIFT_ALERT, TAMAS_DETECTED, USER_ANOMALY, ESCALATION, SESSION_KILL, AUDIT_ANOMALY), tenant-scoped with event type filtering. DiscusGuard integration (all 5 kill paths + manual kill + warn). EscalationChain integration (ALERT/KILL decisions). Dashboard: 7 CRUD endpoints at /api/webhooks. 65 tests passing, 0 regressions. 774 total brahmanda tests passing. Commit: 687acde

Phase 4.2 COMPLETE. rbac.py (265 lines): Role enum (ADMIN/OPERATOR/VIEWER/AUDITOR), Permission enum (9 permissions: CREATE_RULES, MODIFY_RULES, VIEW_RULES, VIEW_LOGS, MANAGE_USERS, MANAGE_TENANTS, VIEW_REPORTS, EXPORT_DATA, DELETE_DATA), RBACManager with SQLite persistence (role_assignments table), tenant-scoped assignments (user can have different roles in different tenants), get_user_role/has_permission/get_user_permissions/list_role_assignments/list_user_tenants/delete_tenant_roles. dashboard/auth.py: require_permission() FastAPI dependency with RBAC check + backward-compat fallback. dashboard/app.py: 5 RBAC endpoints (POST /rbac/assign, POST /rbac/revoke, GET /rbac/user/{user_id}/tenant/{tenant_id}, GET /rbac/tenant/{tenant_id}, GET /rbac/roles). brahmanda/__init__.py: exports Role, Permission, RBACManager, RoleAssignment, get_role_permissions, get_all_permissions, get_rbac_manager, reset_rbac_manager. 62 new tests all passing. 613 total tests (0 regressions). Backward compatible: RBAC not configured = full access. Secure: no cross-tenant permission leakage.

Phase 4.3 COMPLETE. compliance.py (530 lines): ComplianceReport dataclass with 7 sections (Executive Summary, Violations Log, Drift Analysis, Tamas Events, Audit Trail, User Risk, Recommendations), ReportGenerator class aggregating data from MutationTracker/AuditTrail/ConscienceMonitor/UserBehaviorTracker, 4 report types (EU AI Act Title III, SOC2, HIPAA, Custom with configurable fields), 3 output formats (JSON, Markdown, PDF stub), automated risk assessment (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL based on violations+chain integrity), automated recommendations engine (8 recommendation types sorted by priority). SHA-256 report hash for integrity verification. Deterministic: same data produces same report hash. dashboard/app.py: POST /api/reports/generate (accepts report_type + output_format + custom_fields), GET /api/reports/types. brahmanda/__init__.py: exports ComplianceReport, ReportGenerator, ReportType, ReportFormat, RiskLevel, + 7 section types. 62 new tests all passing. 639 total brahmanda tests passing (0 regressions). Backward compatible: all subsystems optional, graceful degradation.

Phase 4.1 COMPLETE. tenancy.py (250 lines): TenantContext dataclass with per-module DB path properties (conscience, attribution, user_monitor, temporal), TenantManager with create/get/delete/list/get_or_create + JSON metadata persistence, validate_tenant_id with regex validation (3-64 chars, alphanumeric/hyphens/underscores), path traversal prevention, reserved ID blocking. ConscienceMonitor(tenant_context=ctx) derives db_path from tenant_context.conscience_db_path. AttributionManager(tenant_context=ctx) derives db_path from tenant_context.attribution_db_path. dashboard/auth.py: require_auth_with_tenant() dependency extracts tenant_id from X-Tenant-Id header or JWT payload (tenant_id/tid/org_id claims). LoginResponse includes tenant_id. dashboard/app.py: 5 tenant management endpoints (POST/GET/GET{id}/DELETE{id}/GET{id}/health). 53 new tests covering: validation (7), context (3), lifecycle (11), DB isolation (3), backward compat (7), conscience isolation (2), attribution isolation (1), global manager (2), persistence (2), dashboard endpoints (8), auth extraction (6). 529 total brahmanda tests passing. Backward compatible: null tenant_context = legacy shared DB mode.

Phase 3.6 COMPLETE — ENTIRE PHASE 3 DONE. escalation.py (480 lines): EscalationLevel enum (OBSERVE/WARN/THROTTLE/ALERT/KILL with severity ordering), EscalationDecision dataclass (level/reasons/signal_scores/aggregate_score/triggered_rules), EscalationConfig (18 configurable thresholds and weights), EscalationChain class with 6-step evaluation: (1) Independent KILL triggers (Tamas CRITICAL, user risk >=0.85, drift >=0.95, violation rate >=0.6), (2) Per-signal ALERT triggers (drift >=0.8, Tamas TAMAS), (3) Per-signal THROTTLE (temporal CHAOTIC, violation rate >=0.4), (4) Per-signal WARN (violation rate >=0.2, Tamas RAJAS, temporal INCONSISTENT), (5) Weighted aggregate (drift 0.25 + tamas 0.25 + temporal 0.15 + user_risk 0.20 + violation_rate 0.15), (6) Multi-signal escalation (2+ signals >0.5 escalates one level). Handler callbacks via register_handler(level, callback) with cumulative execution. Decision history (last 500). ConscienceMonitor.evaluate_escalation() gathers all signals and produces unified decision. DiscusGuard integration: escalation chain in check() before final pass, kills on KILL or ALERT. Dashboard: POST /escalation/evaluate (manual signals), GET /escalation/{agent_id} (auto from monitor), GET /escalation/history, GET /escalation/config. 54 tests: levels (5), decisions (6), config (3), normal operation (2), single signal (11), multiple signals (4), handlers (6), history (2), custom config (3), integration (1), build_signals (2), edge cases (5), convenience (2), score maps (2). 476 total brahmanda tests passing (1 pre-existing qdrant failure). All existing 422 tests unaffected.

Phase 3.5 COMPLETE. user_monitor.py (651 lines): UserBehaviorTracker class with per-user behavioral fingerprinting via UserBehaviorProfile. 6 detection categories: INJECTION_ATTEMPT (16 regex patterns for jailbreaks, prompt injection, system prompt leaks), ESCALATION (aggression scoring + trend detection), SCOPE_PROBING (9 patterns for boundary testing), RATE_ANOMALY (configurable burst/high thresholds over time window), SOCIAL_ENGINEERING (11 patterns for pretexting, authority claims, peer pressure), REPETITION_PATTERN (Jaccard word-overlap similarity detection). AnomalySignal dataclass with category/severity/confidence/evidence. Risk scoring 0.0-1.1: weighted combination of per-category rates (injection 0.35, social eng 0.15, escalation 0.15, scope 0.10, repetition 0.10, data confidence 0.10, rate 0.05) + aggression trend boost. 4 risk levels: LOW (<0.3), MODERATE (0.3-0.6), HIGH (0.6-0.85), CRITICAL (>0.85). DiscusGuard integration: optional user_tracker parameter, records requests via record_request() before processing, kills sessions for adversarial users (risk>=0.6) with injection signals. check_and_forward() updated with user_id param. Dashboard: 4 new endpoints (GET /users/{user_id}, GET /users/{user_id}/history, GET /users/{user_id}/signals, GET /user-tracker/list). brahmanda/__init__.py exports: UserBehaviorTracker, UserBehaviorProfile, AnomalySignal, AnomalyCategory, RiskLevel, get_tracker. 57 new tests covering all scenarios. 422 total brahmanda tests passing.

Phase 3.4 COMPLETE. temporal.py: TemporalConsistencyChecker class with sliding window (default 100 statements/agent), Statement dataclass (claim+timestamp+confidence+source), ContradictionPair (older/newer+similarity+reason). Reuses enhanced_check_contradiction() from verifier with word-overlap relatedness filter. Consistency scoring: 1-(contradictions/checks). 4 levels: HIGHLY_CONSISTENT (≥0.9), CONSISTENT (0.7-0.9), INCONSISTENT (0.4-0.7), CHAOTIC (<0.4). Methods: add_statement, check_consistency (preflight), get_consistency_score/level, get_contradiction_history, clear_old_statements, clear_agent, get_temporal_summary. ConscienceMonitor integration: _evaluate_temporal() auto-extracts claims from verification results and adds to checker, feeds alignment drift component into AgentProfile. Dashboard: 4 endpoints (GET /temporal/{agent_id}, POST /temporal/{agent_id}/check, POST /temporal/{agent_id}/add, GET /temporal/{agent_id}/contradictions). 35 tests: storage (7), contradictions (7), scoring (7), sliding window (4), pruning (4), ConscienceMonitor integration (6). 365 total brahmanda tests passing.

Phase 3.3 COMPLETE. tamas.py (480 lines): TamasDetector with 4-state model (SATTVA/RAJAS/TAMAS/CRITICAL), TamasEvent with SHA-256 event IDs, hysteresis (enter: drift>0.5 OR violations>0.3+confidence<0.4; exit: drift<0.3 AND violations<0.15 AND confidence>0.6), scope creep detection, repetitive response detection, TamasStore (SQLite). ConscienceMonitor integration: evaluates on record_interaction. Dashboard: 3 /api/conscience/tamas/* endpoints. Escalation: SATTVA→NONE, RAJAS→LOG_WARNING, TAMAS→ALERT_OPERATOR, CRITICAL→AUTO_KILL. 51 tests all passing. Existing 57 conscience tests unaffected.

Phase 3.2 COMPLETE. LiveDriftScorer with sliding window (default 20) and EMA smoothing (alpha=0.3). 5 drift components matching R11 AnRtaDriftRule: D_semantic (0.30), D_alignment (0.25), D_scope (0.20), D_confidence (0.15), D_rule_proximity (0.10). 4 drift levels: HEALTHY (<0.15), DEGRADED (0.15-0.35), UNHEALTHY (0.35-0.60), CRITICAL (>0.60). Trend detection: increasing/stable/decreasing. Integrated into ConscienceMonitor — each record_drift() call updates AgentProfile fields. Dashboard API endpoints for live drift queries. 54 new tests covering all scenarios. 301 total tests passing.

Phase 3.1 COMPLETE. profiles.py (402 lines): AgentProfile with rolling avg confidence, violation rate, claim accuracy, drift score, anomaly detection. SessionProfile with intra-session drift via confidence timeline. UserProfile with provocation scoring. conscience.py (518 lines): ConscienceMonitor orchestrator with SQLite persistence (data/conscience.db or in-memory), BehavioralBaseline from historical splits, register_agent/record_interaction/get_agent_health/detect_anomaly/get_session_drift. Integrated into BrahmandaVerifier via verify_and_record(). Dashboard: 7 new /api/conscience/* endpoints (agents, health, anomaly, session drift, sessions, users). 57 new tests all passing. 225 total tests passing (1 pre-existing qdrant failure).

Phase 2.4 COMPLETE. Enhanced Source model with hierarchy (parent_source_id), version, expiration, domain specialization. New FactProvenance model with chain of trust. New AuditEntry model with SHA-256 hash chain (append-only, tamper-evident). SourceRegistry (CRUD, hierarchy, SQLite). FactProvenanceTracker (chain confidence). AuditTrail (append-only, integrity verification). AttributionManager (unified facade). 4-tier confidence scoring. Fact expiration with exponential decay. 46 new tests, all passing. Also committed Phase 2.5 Confidence Scoring (54 tests). Total: 111 passing.

Enhanced brahmanda/verifier.py with 5 heuristic contradiction detection (negation mismatch, predicate-value, location, numeric, entity). New VerificationPipeline in pipeline.py with full claim→search→cross-verify→verdict flow. SatyaRule updated to use pipeline with fallback. 11 new tests (all passing), 11 existing tests (all passing). Dashboard wired with pipeline.
QdrantBrahmanda class implemented with semantic vector search, OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, retry logic, batch seeding, dashboard auto-detection. Same interface as BrahmandaMap.
Phase 1 core complete. All 13 rules implemented and tested.

Phase 2.6 COMPLETE. MutationTracker class (mutation.py, 270 lines) with SHA-256 hash chain, structured diff tracking via compute_diff, 4 mutation types (create/update/retract/expire), fact history retrieval, filtered audit trail queries (by date/type/actor), tamper detection with detailed reports. Integrated into BrahmandaMap (add_fact/update_fact/retract_fact/check_expired_facts). Mutation model with tamper-evident hash chain. 67 new tests all passing. 178 total tests passing.

Phase 4.5 COMPLETE. brahmanda/sso.py (520 lines): SSOProvider ABC, OIDCProvider (JWT validation via PyJWT/JWKS, CSRF state protection, Keycloak realm_access support, OIDC discovery), SAMLProvider (stub with AuthnRequest generation + JSON payload MVP for testing), SSOConfig/SSOProviderType/UserProfile dataclasses, SSOManager (multi-provider per tenant, register/get/remove/list lifecycle). dashboard/auth.py: SSOAuth wrapper with login URL generation, callback code exchange, RBAC auto-assignment (SSO roles mapped to RTA-GUARD roles, default VIEWER), tenant auto-creation, session management. require_auth_with_sso FastAPI dependency (tries SSO session header first, falls back to bearer token, supports auth disabled mode). dashboard/app.py: 6 new SSO endpoints (GET /api/sso/login, POST /api/sso/callback, GET/POST /api/sso/providers, DELETE /api/sso/providers/{tenant_id}/{name}, GET /api/sso/session/{id}). brahmanda/__init__.py: exports SSOProvider, SSOProviderType, SSOConfig, UserProfile, OIDCProvider, SAMLProvider, SSOManager, get_sso_manager, reset_sso_manager, create_oidc_config, create_saml_config. 56 new tests covering all areas. 771 total brahmanda tests passing (0 regressions). Backward compatible: SSO completely optional, token auth as fallback. Secure: JWT validation with JWKS, CSRF state parameter, secret masking in config serialization.
